leadText: The Dark Stone (Japanese: ダークストーン Dark Stone) is a Key Item introduced in Generation V. It is one of the two Dragon Stones, being Zekrom in its dormant form.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon White [ edit | edit source ] It summons Zekrom to assist the player against N and Reshiram at N's Castle during the storyline of Pokémon White. Pokémon Black 2 [ edit | edit source ] It summons Zekrom at the top of Dragonspiral Tower during the post-game of Pokémon Black 2.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Zekrom's body was destroyed and changed into this stone. It is said to be waiting for the emergence of a hero.

It is said to be waiting for the emergence of a hero. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method W Nacrene City (received from Lenora after clearing Relic Castle ) B2 N's Castle (received from N after the player defeats him and Zekrom )
